prompt: Create a vertical cinematic street-fashion portrait of VLNS mascot, a full-body humanoid character standing on a sunny sidewalk outside a cute dessert shop. The character has one oversized glossy spherical helmet head covered in bright psychedelic graffiti colors, with one jagged purple triangular visor/mouth shape, two circular side headphone-like ear modules, and one glowing teal light spot on the face. The body wears a black cyberpunk streetwear outfit: one shiny black leather jacket with gray spiky faux-fur shoulders, one black hoodie, one pair of baggy black cargo pants, two black gloves, and two iridescent high-top sneakers with purple laces and a visible “C” emblem on each tongue. Add neon paint splatters in pink, yellow, green, and purple across the jacket and pants, multiple small alien/skull patches, a visible “VLNS” text patch on the sleeve and another on the cargo pocket, and one dangling chain with one white skull charm on the right side. The character holds exactly one transparent purple dessert pouch containing soft-serve ice cream with both hands at chest height. Background: charming storefront with large glass windows, warm bakery lights and pastries inside, purple-and-white striped awning, pastel balloons and lanterns, potted flowers, leafy trees, blue sky, and soft afternoon sunlight. Use a low-angle 35mm fashion editorial look, shallow depth of field, realistic materials, vibrant color grading, crisp subject focus, natural candid pose, and a magical everyday cinematic atmosphere. Prioritize consistent character identity and full-body visibility; no extra characters, no cropped feet, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a vertical cinematic street-fashion portrait of VLNS mascot, a full-body humanoid character standing on a sunny sidewalk outside a cute dessert shop. The character has one oversized glossy spherical helmet head covered in bright psychedelic graffiti colors, with one jagged purple triangular visor/mouth shape, two circular side headphone-like ear modules, and one glowing teal light spot on the face. The body wears a black cyberpunk streetwear outfit: one shiny black leather jacket with gray spiky faux-fur shoulders, one black hoodie, one pair of baggy black cargo pants, two black gloves, and two iridescent high-top sneakers with purple laces and a visible “C” emblem on each tongue. Add neon paint splatters in pink, yellow, green, and purple across the jacket and pants, multiple small alien/skull patches, a visible “VLNS” text patch on the sleeve and another on the cargo pocket, and one dangling chain with one white skull charm on the right side. The character holds exactly one transparent purple dessert pouch containing soft-serve ice cream with both hands at chest height. Background: charming storefront with large glass windows, warm bakery lights and pastries inside, purple-and-white striped awning, pastel balloons and lanterns, potted flowers, leafy trees, blue sky, and soft afternoon sunlight. Use a low-angle 35mm fashion editorial look, shallow depth of field, realistic materials, vibrant color grading, crisp subject focus, natural candid pose, and a magical everyday cinematic atmosphere. Prioritize consistent character identity and full-body visibility; no extra characters, no cropped feet, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张垂直电影感的街头时尚肖像，主角是 VLNS 吉祥物，一个全身人形角色，站在一家可爱甜品店外阳光明媚的人行道上。该角色拥有一个超大的光面球形头盔，表面覆盖着明亮的迷幻涂鸦色彩，配有一个锯齿状的紫色三角形面罩/嘴部形状、两个圆形的侧边耳机式耳部模块，以及面部的一个发光青色光点。身体穿着黑色赛博朋克街头服饰：一件带有灰色尖刺仿皮草肩部的亮面黑色皮夹克、一件黑色连帽衫、一条黑色宽松工装裤、一副黑色手套，以及一双带有紫色鞋带且鞋舌上可见“C”标志的虹彩高帮运动鞋。在夹克和裤子上添加粉色、黄色、绿色和紫色的霓虹油漆溅射效果，缝制多个小型外星人/骷髅补丁，袖子和工装口袋上可见“VLNS”文字补丁，右侧悬挂一条带有白色骷髅吊坠的链子。角色双手在胸前捧着一个透明的紫色甜品袋，里面装着软冰淇淋。背景：迷人的店面，有巨大的玻璃窗，室内透出温暖的烘焙灯光和糕点，紫白相间的遮阳棚，柔和色调的气球和灯笼，盆栽花卉，绿树，蓝天，以及柔和的午后阳光。采用低角度 35mm 时尚编辑风格，浅景深，真实材质，鲜艳的色彩分级，清晰的主体对焦，自然的抓拍姿势，以及充满魔力的日常电影氛围。确保角色特征一致且全身可见；禁止出现额外角色、禁止裁剪脚部、禁止添加水印。
